tweets.text:
𝐇𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐓𝐚𝐬𝐤 𝐅𝐨𝐫𝐜𝐞 𝐖𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐝 𝐔𝐩 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐒𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐈𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐬 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐆𝐮𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐒𝐦𝐮𝐠𝐠𝐥𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐬 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬

The last of seven illegal aliens from Guatemala was sentenced for working together and being paid to smuggle illegal aliens into the United States from Guatemala, Mexico, and other countries in Central or South America, including Asia. 

Further info: https://t.co/rw0ANuaMng

HSTF Tulsa, Oklahoma City, Dallas, Flagstaff, and Charlotte offices comprise of agents and officers from the Tulsa, McAlester and Greensboro, North Carolina Drug Enforcement Administration field offices; the Tulsa and Oklahoma City IRS field offices; the Tulsa and Oklahoma City U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Removal Operations field offices; and the U.S. Marshals offices in the Northern District of Oklahoma, with the assistance of several state law enforcement agencies.
tweets.text_resolved:
𝐇𝐨𝐦𝐞𝐥𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐫𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐓𝐚𝐬𝐤 𝐅𝐨𝐫𝐜𝐞 𝐖𝐫𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐝 𝐔𝐩 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐏𝐫𝐨𝐬𝐞𝐜𝐮𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧 𝐨𝐟 𝐒𝐞𝐯𝐞𝐧 𝐈𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐠𝐚𝐥 𝐀𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐬 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐆𝐮𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐦𝐚𝐥𝐚𝐧 𝐭𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐒𝐦𝐮𝐠𝐠𝐥𝐞𝐝 𝐀𝐥𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐬 𝐢𝐧𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐔𝐧𝐢𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐒𝐭𝐚𝐭𝐞𝐬

The last of seven illegal aliens from Guatemala was sentenced for working together and being paid to smuggle illegal aliens into the United States from Guatemala, Mexico, and other countries in Central or South America, including Asia. 

Further info: https://www.justice.gov/usao-ndok/pr/homeland-security-task-force-wrapped-prosecution-seven-illegal-aliens-guatemalan

HSTF Tulsa, Oklahoma City, Dallas, Flagstaff, and Charlotte offices comprise of agents and officers from the Tulsa, McAlester and Greensboro, North Carolina Drug Enforcement Administration field offices; the Tulsa and Oklahoma City IRS field offices; the Tulsa and Oklahoma City U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Removal Operations field offices; and the U.S. Marshals offices in the Northern District of Oklahoma, with the assistance of several state law enforcement agencies.

author.description: Official account of the US Attorney's Office for the Northern District of Oklahoma. Privacy policy: https://t.co/S72Hz2pQNh
